Package com.tonic.jaloc.impl.array2ds

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    PBoolArray2D
    A fixed-shape 2D bool array over a single bit-packed native allocation, addressed row-major.
    PByteArray2D
    A fixed-shape 2D byte array over a single native allocation, addressed row-major.
    PCharArray2D
    A fixed-shape 2D char array over a single native allocation, addressed row-major.
    PDoubleArray2D
    A fixed-shape 2D double array over a single native allocation, addressed row-major.
    PFloatArray2D
    A fixed-shape 2D float array over a single native allocation, addressed row-major.
    PIntArray2D
    A fixed-shape 2D int array over a single native allocation, addressed row-major.
    PLongArray2D
    A fixed-shape 2D long array over a single native allocation, addressed row-major.
    PShortArray2D
    A fixed-shape 2D short array over a single native allocation, addressed row-major.
